content: Self-Refine's iterative no-training refinement framework can serve as a lightweight 'base skeleton' that can be augmented with multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to address Self-Refine's limitation of blind spots from single-perspective feedback. This creates a new unsupervised refinement approach that retains Self-Refine's advantage of no extra training or supervised data while fixing its flaw of one-sided iterative correction.
